The PR rewrites reply, queue, directory, status, tool-display, and channel helper hot paths from array helper chains and shift/unshift patterns to direct loops/head-index queues, with a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a performance cleanup/refactor, not a bug report with an expected failing behavior. The relevant verification is diff review plus exact-head CI and focused reply/agent/channel equivalence coverage.
